contactFormPlaceholderPayload: Brief description of project scope and requirements...
journeyPageDescription: A chronological record of systems built, scaling challenges solved, and production-grade software shipped. Focused on high-throughput architecture and distributed systems.
journeyEventBusDescription: Redesigned the core messaging infrastructure to handle 10k+ events/sec. Migrated from a monolithic polling system to a push-based architecture using Kafka and gRPC. Reduced latency by 400ms across the board.
journeySaaSDescription: Built and launched a privacy-first analytics platform from scratch. Leveraged ClickHouse for columnar storage and Go for ingestion services. Sustained 1M+ rows/day with predictable infrastructure costs.
journeyCdnDescription: Orchestrated the migration of 50TB+ static assets into a multi-cloud CDN strategy. Implemented edge routing and image transformations for regionalized delivery and lower request latency.
